title: [quality] Scanner tool malfunction: PR #20868 replaced 5 test files with base64 blobs — need guardrail + tool fix
description:
## Finding

PR #20868 (`[scanner] fix: auto-QA memory leaks and any-type reductions`) claims to make small, focused test improvements (`vi.clearAllTimers()` + `any` → concrete types). The actual diff is dramatically different from the description:

**5 test files have been overwritten with single-line base64-encoded blobs of their original content**, silently deleting ~1,032 lines of test coverage:

| File | Deletions | Replacement |
|---|---|---|
| `web/src/components/dashboard/customizer/secti
